{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/1988660?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/naoyashiga/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/naoyashiga/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/naoyashiga/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/naoyashiga/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/naoyashiga", "id": 1988660, "login": "naoyashiga", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjE5ODg2NjA=", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/naoyashiga/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/naoyashiga/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/naoyashiga/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/naoyashiga/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/naoyashiga/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/naoyashiga", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-46547", "cvss": {"score": 6.1, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:R/S:C/C:L/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 6.1, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:R/S:C/C:L/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-79", "name": "Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting')"}], "description": "### Summary
A reflected XSS vulnerability exists in the Page Leaving Warning page. The `ncRedirectUrl` and `ncBackUrl` query parameters are used in `window.location.href` and `<a>` tag bindings without validation, allowing `javascript:` URI injection.

### Details
`PageLeavingWarning.vue` reads `ncRedirectUrl` and `ncBackUrl` directly from the route query without validation. When `isSameOriginUrl()` returns `false` (as it does for `javascript:` URIs), the raw URL is assigned to `window.location.href`, executing arbitrary JavaScript. The redirect URL is also bound directly to an `<a>` tag's `href` attribute.

### Impact
An attacker can execute arbitrary JavaScript in the context of the NocoDB application by sending a crafted link to a victim. No authentication is required.

### Credit
This issue was reported by [@naoyashiga](https://github.com/naoyashiga).", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00156, "percentile": 0.05131}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-9qgr-6vpg-9gh9", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-21T20:34:09Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-9qgr-6vpg-9gh9", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-9qgr-6vpg-9gh9"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-46547"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-05-21T20:34:09Z", "references": ["https://github.com/nocodb/nocodb/security/advisories/GHSA-9qgr-6vpg-9gh9", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-9qgr-6vpg-9gh9"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/nocodb/nocodb/security-advisories/GHSA-9qgr-6vpg-9gh9", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/nocodb/nocodb", "summary": "NocoDB: Reflected Cross-Site Scripting via Page Leaving Redirect URL", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-21T20:34:10Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-9qgr-6vpg-9gh9", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": null, "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "nocodb"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 0.301.3"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: NocoDB: Reflected Cross-Site Scripting via Page Leaving Redirect URL
